reviews.review_description:
RIVAL VR is a free app on the Meta Store where creators share high-quality 360° and 180° immersive videos. From travel scenes to creative experiments, the community uploads a growing range of experiences you can watch directly in VR.

You can like each 3D video, leave comments, and follow the creators you enjoy. The community is still small, but that also makes it easy to discover new talent early and watch the platform grow over time, just like the early days of online video platforms back in 2006.

If you enjoy exploring new VR spaces and supporting independent creators, RIVAL VR is a calm, friendly place to start.

I guess for now it's getting 1 star. It loads the interface and that's it. Won't load any content. Uninstalled and reinstalled it. Still nothing.

reviews.review_title: Great VR video platform so far
reviews.review_description:
Back in January, I was invited to join a new immersive video platform called RIVAL, which has recently launched on the Meta Quest app store. (Apple Vision Pro and Pico apps are in the works) I have been regularly uploading VR and 3D content to DeoVR, YouTube VR, and the Meta TV app platforms, all of which have their pros and cons, and was interested to see what a new video platform could bring to the table.

The first thing that immediately stood out as I started browsing the platforms is that the vast majority of videos on RIVAL are VR animations and VR/3D gameplay videos. As a full-time animator who has been creating VR180 animations in my free time, it was a nice surprise to see other VR animations. (the few animations I see on DeoVR are mainly the creepy dancing anime girl videos)

While there are some live-action VR videos on Rival , it is definitely lacking. This may be possibly because Rival is reaching out to animators/VR gamers to join their platform. While I don't want RIVAL to be flooded with VR travel videos, I'm hoping people who create high-quality VR180 content shares their work on the platform.

Rival supports 360, VR180, and 3D/Spatial videos. No 2D videos. In fact, if you upload a 2D video to the platform, Rival currently converts it (with the power of AI) to a Spatial 3D video. They have even reached out to a few artists/animators and offered to convert their animations into VR180 animations. I'm not sure how long they plan to do this and/or if they plan on eventually charging for this conversion service.

As of this writing, Rival is completely free to use and there are no "premium" videos hidden by a paywall. From my discussions with the RIVAL team, they do no seem interested in having a paid tier of videos. As for content creators who want to make money on this platform, RIVAL said they plan on allowing audience gifting/donations, brand sponsorships, video competitions/contests, and some sort of subscription.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the detailed feedback! 🙌 We're really glad you're enjoying the platform and noticing the VR animations and 3D content. We’ve got an exciting list of features in the works and big plans ahead that we can’t wait for you to see! Keep sharing your work, and we’re looking forward to seeing more VR180 animations in the future! 🚀

reviews.review_description: I’ve always felt like there was a disconnect between creating content and others viewing it from a different 2/D perspective. Now they can relive the moment just the way I did through Rival. I think this is going to help a lot of people make more informed decisions on the games they choose to play and also deepen the connection between creators and their audience.  Can’t wait to see how far Rival goes!

developer_response.body: Beautifully said - this is exactly why we built Rival 🙌 We’re just getting started, and there’s so much more coming. Join our Discord to help shape the future with us! https://discord.gg/DnBk37f9PC

Absolutely stunning display of ingenuity with Rival! It’s so great to actually feel and experience the videos rather than just watch. Great easy to understand UI which makes it so much easier for creators like me. Great community that truly deserves more credit. 10/10 would recommend!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much - that means a lot! 🙌 Come join our Discord to connect with more creators and help shape the future of immersive video! https://discord.gg/DnBk37f9PC 🚀

reviews.review_description: Rival is an exciting and fresh new platform for VR content creators. The idea of being able to share gameplay in full 3D with real depth is something I haven’t seen done like this before. As a creator, I really appreciate the focus on supporting the community and giving us tools to grow and monetize early on. The team has a great job so far, and I looking forward to seeing how Rival evolves!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much🚀 Stay tuned, we’ve got many more features coming your way. Join our Discord to connect, share feedback, and help shape Rival’s future! https://discord.gg/DnBk37f9PC

reviews.review_description:
I was recently invited to join this platform, so I wanted to give it a shot before posting, and wow is it ever cool. The depth effect it gives to videos makes them so much more immersive and impressive, really gives scale to VR that flatscreen platforms like YouTube or TikTok just can't.

Very excited to start making some projects here!

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much! 💜 We love hearing how much you're enjoying the depth effect on Rival - it really does make a huge difference!
If you ever want to chat or share feedback, come join our Discord: https://discord.gg/DnBk37f9PC

reviews.review_title: the next gen of Let's Play
reviews.review_description:
So cool to see gameplay transformed into 3D VR experiences! It's like I'm right in the action without the stress of actually playing intense and tough games - watching Walking Dead/Phasmophobia playthroughs and walkthroughs in full VR just hits different

The vids are high quality and lag-free, with content spanning Blade & Sorcery, Bonelab, Gtag, Animal Company, and Beat Saber. More and more creators are sharing their funniest, craziest gameplay moments every day, so there’s always something fresh to watch

I can defo see gamers using this app to learn and build their own in-game skills too, like learning how to lucio run in Gtag etc or figuring out how to get unstuck in a puzzle game without having to take off the headset

developer_response.body: Thanks for the awesome feedback! 💜 We’re so glad you’re enjoying the 3D VR experience - watching gameplay in VR really does hit different!

reviews.review_description: Hey, solid app! I don't have any skin in the game between competitors, but for some reason Photon is much more comfortable on my eyes. Can you all look at the SBS settings between eyes or something like that to see what is going on in your app? It's kind of like the feeling of going cross eyed more quickly in this app. I don't know whether it's a more pronounced vergeance accomodation conflict with the content I happened to see on Rival, or what. I've tried to control for similar types of content, the  movement/viewing distances in videos, etc. and can't zero in on what's doing it. (Not a specialist.)  Long time VR user here, so it's not a newbie eye strain issue. I generally like your UI and the content being uploaded though. Keep building!
Keep getting failure to upload experience. Nothing works.
It's a good app with a lot of potential. There's few things that needs work, such as adding more options in the filter tab and more. But I am looking forward to the future of this app.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the support! 🙌 We’re already working on expanding the filter options and more - lots of updates on the way. Stay tuned and join our Discord to be part of the journey! https://discord.gg/DnBk37f9PC

reviews.review_description: This app is insane. I love how you can realy be in the enviorment of the videos (especialy the roller coaster ones). If you own a quest this is a must have.

developer_response.body: Love to hear that! 🔥 We want to take immersive content to the next level - roller coasters are just the start!🎢

reviews.review_description: rival is really fun and amazing!! You should get it! it’s like tiktok but for only VR perfect for any VR lovers

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback and support! 🔥

reviews.review_description: I saw this just got released today so I downloaded it not expecting much.  This is a very, very nice app/platform with a ton of interesting content presented in a really compelling manner.  Basically what the app offers is streaming video content in a variety of formats including 180/360 and (most impressively) Spatial video.  I have no idea where they sourced the videos, but there is quite a lot on offer.  I tried a number of videos, but the most impressive (so far) was a stunning 8+ minute spatial video rendered in stunning high resolution of bugs, fruits, and other stuff.  It played in MR and was like an immersive 3D window in my living room.  I doubted streaming this high-resolution video would work well, but the quality is exceptional.  You can favorite the videos and view individual creator profiles/library.  I have no idea how the devs will monetize this--since it's FREE you absolutely need to check it out.  It's a REALLY good app; my experience was so positive that I made time to write this review immediately after checking it out.  It really is *that* impressive!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for your feedback! 🫶 We love hearing how much you enjoy Rival and can’t wait to see what you think of our new social features. If you ever have more feedback, our team is always here on Discord! https://discord.gg/DnBk37f9PC

reviews.review_description: I absolutely love the idea behind rival, we've needed a 3d/VR media app for VR for some time now. Rival is that and so much more. I'd happily recommend it to all my VR friends!

reviews.review_title: Love this app but needs some features
reviews.review_description:
Very cool app that allows you to watch 3D videos with ease, like a youtube for 3D video. 
If you guys can work on hand tracking and allow me to move the screen etc with my hands + use other hand to still change channels/videos. Then i really see a future for this app. Also i would like to see more options for streaming quality etc and i did see some options but they were not easy to find. 
So basically, please fix GUI and navigation of the app including hand tracking.and start getting 
some youtubers to upload on here

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the feedback! 🙌 We're already working on hand tracking, improved screen controls, better streaming quality options, and an updated GUI to make everything smoother. Join our Discord to follow progress and share more ideas: https://discord.gg/DnBk37f9PC
